# Health Alliance SoCal

> Health Alliance SoCal (HASC) provides integrated behavioral health and psychiatric care partnerships for skilled nursing facilities, assisted living communities, memory care units, and board & care homes across Southern and Northern California. Board-certified clinicians, CMS-compliant psychotropic medication management, and on-site/telepsychiatry support.

## About
- Co-founded by Danielle Ramage (DNP, PMHNP-BC) and Anil Sharma (MD)
- Medical specialty: Psychiatry / Behavioral Health for long-term care
- Service area: Los Angeles, Orange, San Diego, Riverside, Ventura, and Humboldt counties, California
- Contact: info@healthalliancesocal.com · +1-310-462-3879

## Services
- [Skilled Nursing Facility Psychiatry](https://www.healthalliancesocal.com/services/skilled-nursing-facility-psychiatry): Integrated psychiatric partnerships for SNFs.
- [Assisted Living Psychiatry](https://www.healthalliancesocal.com/services/assisted-living-psychiatry): Behavioral health for assisted living communities.
- [Memory Care Behavioral Health](https://www.healthalliancesocal.com/services/memory-care-behavioral-health): Dementia and memory-care behavioral support.
- [Board & Care Mental Health](https://www.healthalliancesocal.com/services/board-and-care-mental-health): Psychiatric care for board & care homes.
- [Telepsychiatry for Long-Term Care](https://www.healthalliancesocal.com/services/telepsychiatry-long-term-care): Remote psychiatric coverage.
- [CMS F-Tag 758 Support](https://www.healthalliancesocal.com/services/cms-f-tag-758-support): Psychotropic compliance and survey readiness.
- [Psychotropic Medication Management](https://www.healthalliancesocal.com/services/psychotropic-medication-management): Gradual Dose Reduction and safe prescribing.
- [Dementia Behavioral Management](https://www.healthalliancesocal.com/services/dementia-behavioral-management): Non-pharmacologic and clinical behavioral strategies.

## Locations
- [Los Angeles County](https://www.healthalliancesocal.com/locations/los-angeles-county)
- [Orange County](https://www.healthalliancesocal.com/locations/orange-county)
- [San Diego County](https://www.healthalliancesocal.com/locations/san-diego-county)
- [Riverside County](https://www.healthalliancesocal.com/locations/riverside-county)
- [Ventura County](https://www.healthalliancesocal.com/locations/ventura-county)
- [Humboldt County](https://www.healthalliancesocal.com/locations/humboldt-county)
